positive: A stylized, clean silhouette design of a friendly, whimsical fox sitting amongst geometrically patterned leaves and delicate woodland flora. The fox should have bright, warm oranges and deep russets against an emerald and teal background. Utilize strong negative space, bold linework, and flat, graphic color blocking reminiscent of mid-century modern or Scandinavian folk art. Composition should be centered and easily scalable for print, with minimal complexity near the edges. The overall mood is joyful, adventurous, and calm. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, suitable for apparel print.
negative: photorealistic, messy, grunge, low quality, watermark, text, blurry, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grainy, noisy, signature, logo, logo, trademark
